query: SELECT id, groupName, aliases, trend, rwThreatLevel, totalVictims, topSectors, topCountries FROM ransomware_groups WHERE groupName LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR groupName LIKE '%Fulcrum%' OR groupName LIKE '%fulcrum%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT id, groupName, aliases, trend, rwThreatLevel, totalVictims, topSectors, topCountries FROM ransomware_groups WHERE groupName LIKE '%FULCRUM%' OR groupName LIKE '%Fulcrum%' OR groupName LIKE '%fulcrum%';
